home.title: GlowList — The procedures your favorite influencers actually got
home.description: See what treatments your favorite influencers received, at which clinic, and book the same procedure in seconds.

influencers.title: Influencers | GlowList
influencers.description: Browse GlowList influencers and the procedures they received.

procedures.title: Procedures | GlowList
procedures.description: Real procedures received by real influencers, organized by category.

book.title: Book | GlowList
book.description: Leave your name and phone and we'll continue on WhatsApp.

landing.title:
Same procedure, same clinic
as your favorite influencer.
landing.subtitle: See exactly what they had done, where, and book it directly on WhatsApp.

steps.title: Pick an influencer or procedure
steps.description: Open any influencer's profile to see what they've had done, or compare who received each procedure.

steps.title: Drop your name & phone
steps.description: No sign-up. Just your name and number — hit send and WhatsApp opens.

steps.title: We book you on WhatsApp
steps.description: A real human manager confirms the date and price directly in WhatsApp.

book.title: Request a consultation
book.subtitle: Just your name and phone. We'll take you to WhatsApp when you press send.
book.agreement: Pressing send opens WhatsApp and counts as consent to our privacy policy.
book.waIntro: Hi, I'd like to book a consultation via GlowList.
